zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Kyme於大約1143年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾索特比時，她的父親Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme50歲，母親Agnes Lindsey51歲。她於1166年與Herbert de Orreby V在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾哈尼阿比結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。她去世於1214年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾多比享年72歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾哈尼阿比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Kyme于大约1143年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾索特比时，她的父亲Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme50岁，母亲Agnes Lindsey51岁。她于1166年与Herbert de Orreby V在英国英格兰林可爾史爾哈尼阿比结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。她去世于1214年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾多比享年72岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾哈尼阿比。

nameMeanings.name: Kyme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North or South Kyme (Lincs).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Kyme was born about 1143, in Sotby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme, was 50 and her mother, Agnes Lindsey, was 51. She married Herbert de Orreby V in 1166, in Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. She died in 1214, in Orby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Kyme est née environ 1143, à Sotby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Agnes Lindsey, avait 51 ans. Elle a épousé Herbert de Orreby V en 1166, à Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Elle est décédée en 1214, à Orby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Kyme um 1143 in Sotby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme 50 und ihre Mutter Agnes Lindsey 51. Sie hat 1166 in Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Herbert de Orreby V geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Sie starb 1214 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Orby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Kyme è nata il circa 1143 nel Sotby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Agnes Lindsey, aveva 51 anni. Lei sposato Herbert de Orreby V nel 1166, nel Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì nel 1214, nel Orby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Kymeが約1143年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアソトビーで生まれた時，父Simon Fitzwilliam de Kymeは50歳，母Agnes Lindseyは51歳であった。1166年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアハグナビーでHerbert de Orreby Vと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼女は1214年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアオルビーで72歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアハグナビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Kyme(이)가 대략 1143년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 소트비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Lindsey(은)는 51세였다. 그녀는 1166년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 하그나비에서 Herbert de Orreby V(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1214년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 오비에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 하그나비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Kyme nasceu aproximadamente 1143, em Sotby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Lindsey, tinha 51 anos. Ela casou-se com Herbert de Orreby V em 1166, em Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1214, em Orby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Kyme родилась около 1143 г. в местности сотби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Lindsey, 51. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herbert de Orreby V в 1166 г. в местности хагнаби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Она умерла в 1214 г. в местности орби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности хагнаби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Kyme nació aproximadamente 1143, en Sotby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Agnes Lindsey, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Herbert de Orreby V en 1166, en Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió en 1214, en Orby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
